channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Young's fadeaway with 1.6 seconds left lifts Hawks to slump-busting 132-130 win over Pistons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Trae Young made a 23-foot fadeaway with 1.6 seconds left and scored 17 of his 34 points in the fourth quarter, lifting the Atlanta Hawks to a 132-130 win over the Detroit Pistons on Monday night. Young helped the Hawks end an eight-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles' Saquon Barkley makes clear 'dream wasn't just getting' to Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles star running back Saquon Barkley made clear the dream season has yet to be realized with Super Bowl LIX around the corner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kerr clarifies ‘stand pat’ comments as Warriors trade rumors heat up
item.description: The Warriors have watched Luka Doncic, Anthony Davis, De'Aaron Fox and Zach Lavine all switch teams ahead of Thursday's trade deadline.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: De’Aaron Fox trade is familiar for Kings interim coach Doug Christie
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Kings interim coach Doug Christie knows what it feels like to be traded midseason. That's because it happened to him, in Sacramento, where he spent the majority of his playing career.
item.dc:creator: TYLER MASON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: President Trump welcomes Florida Panthers to the White House
item.description: The Florida Panthers were the first professional championship team to be celebrated at the White House under the new Trump administration on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Connell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: MLB fires umpire Pat Hoberg for violating league's gambling policy
item.description: Major League Baseball said umpire Pat Hoberg was fired for violating the league's policies when it comes to sports betting. Hoberg was considered one of the best officials.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Browns star Myles Garrett requests trade in public statement
item.description: Cleveland Browns cornerstone defensive end Myles Garrett has officially requested a trade from the organization, implying his Super Bowl dreams won't be fulfilled with team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: De'Aaron Fox will join Victor Wembanyama in San Antonio as part of a 3-team trade, AP sources say
item.description: Victor Wembanyama has a new point guard: De'Aaron Fox is on his way out of Sacramento and headed to San Antonio.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The NBA trade deadline is approaching and Antetokounmpo says no player is exempt from the chaos
item.description: The list of NBA players that might get traded before the 3 p.m. Eastern deadline on Thursday is a long one, according to Milwaukee star Giannis Antetokounmpo. It includes well, basically everybody. “This is the world we’re living in,” Antetokounmpo said. “It’s a business.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Transfer deadline day: done deals and deals to look out for as Man City spends big in winter window
item.description: Europe's winter transfer window closes on Monday, with teams trying to secure late deals in the market before the deadline. Manchester City, Aston Villa and Tottenham might be among the busiest clubs.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON and STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chase Elliott wins Clash at Bowman Gray and sets sights on following it with Daytona 500 victory
item.description: NASCAR returned to its roots with a fight-free preseason exhibition at Bowman Gray Stadium and a popular victory with Chase Elliott winning The Clash on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies go cold in battle for first place
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In the biggest game of the season, the Utah State basketball team had one of its worst offensive performances of the year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU hits 14 three-pointers in fourth straight victory
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders made six of BYU's 14 3-pointers and scored 22 points to lead the Cougars to an 81-75 victory over UCF on Saturday for its fourth straight win. Mawot Mag added a season-high 19 points and matched a career-best with five assists for BYU (15-6, 6-4 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bill Walton to be honored at San Diego Gulls game with bobblehead giveaway, specialty jerseys
item.description: The San Diego Gulls will honor NBA legend Bill Walton at their game against the Toronto Marlies on Friday night, with the first 8,000 fans receiving a Bill Walton bobblehead.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Brotherly love; UCSD's basketball brother-duo team up
item.description: Out at UC San Diego, the Tritons have been riding a wave of success this season as they currently sit at 17-4 with their eyes set on taking the Big West. A team fueled by relationships that go deeper than you may even know, UCSD guard Chris Howell and Assistant Coach Mikey Howell teaming up.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Madsen leads Utes past Cincinnati, 69-66
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored seven of his 18 points in the final two minutes, Keanu Dawes added 12 points and nine rebounds and Utah beat Cincinnati 69-66 on Tuesday night. Ezra Ausar scored 11 points for Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Connor Bedard's spectacular goal sparks Blackhawks to 4-1 win over Lightning
item.description: Connor Bedard scored from a seemingly impossible angle, Arvid Soderblom stopped 34 shots and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-1 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lillard, Antetokounmpo lead Bucks past Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Former Weber State star Damian Lillard and Giannis Antetokounmpo and Damian Lillard each scored 35 points to lead the Milwaukee Bucks to a 125-110 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Utah has now lost six straight games, falling to 10-34 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: UVU hoping to make first NCAA Tournament
item.description: OREM, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Duke, Michigan State, Auburn, Houston andUtah Valley? All of those college basketball teams own double-digit winning streaks right now, with the Wolverines having just won their tenth in a row.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4
